title: Ambala Singam Lyrics Mundasupatti Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Ambala Singam
Singer(s): Sean Roldan, Haricharan
Music: Sean Roldan
Movie: Mundasupatti

Kaattrum en kaala suthum
kattalaikku yengi nikka
kannaththaan kattiputtaa onnnumillada.
naan aambala singam da
naan aambala singam da

Minjithaan ponadhilla
minjinaalum kenjavilla
paasaththa kaattiputta pachchapullada.
naan aambala singam da
naan aambala singam da

Thaediththaan ponadhilla
vandha vamba vittathilla
vanjipu vazhndhadhilla
naan aambala singam da
naan aambala singam da

Vin kallu modhinaalum
modhiramaa pottukkira
pottinnu vandhuputtaa modhippaaruda.
naan aambala singam da
naan aambala singam da

needhiyum nermayum ennirandu kangalada
sodhanayil kooda thorthadhillada.
arasiyal illa, arasanum naanada
elaikkellaam endrum velaikkaaranda

Sulandru adikkum puyalum naanada
irunda boomiyil vidiyal paaradaa.
idiyum puyalum malayum enakkulle
pongi putta erimalathaanada..

Kaattrum en kaala suthum
kattalaikku yengi nikka
kannaththaan kattiputtaa onnnumillada.
naan aambala singam da
naan aambala singam da

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who are the lead actors in the movie Mundasupatti?

The lead actors are Vishnu Vishal and Nandita Swetha.

What is the theme of the song Ambala Singam?

The song is an energetic and motivational track that reflects the vibrant spirit of the movie.

Who composed the music for Mundasupatti?

The music for the movie was composed by Sean Roldan.

When was the movie Mundasupatti released?

The movie was released in the year 2014.

What is the significance of the song Ambala Singam in the movie?

The song highlights the protagonist's spirited and confident nature, aligning with the film's comedic and lively tone.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Ambala Singam from the 2014 Tamil movie Mundasupatti features the lead actor Vishnu Vishal and actress Nandita Swetha. Composed by Sean Roldan and sung by Haricharan and Sean Roldan, this track is an energetic and motivational number. It reflects the protagonist's vibrant and confident personality, aligning with the film's comedic and lively narrative. The song's folk-inspired beats and spirited lyrics make it a memorable addition to Tamil cinema's musical repertoire.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ambala Singam, a vibrant track from the movie Mundasupatti, showcases the dynamic collaboration between singers Haricharan and Sean Roldan under the musical direction of Sean Roldan. This energetic and motivational song captures the essence of the film's lively and humorous narrative. Dive into the beats and let the rhythm uplift your spirits!
stanzaMeanings: The wind blows, and my eyes are fixed on the horizon, nothing else matters. I am a lion of the jungle, I am a lion of the jungle.
It doesn't matter if I miss out, even if I fall, I won't lose my heart, I will show my strength like a green plant. I am a lion of the jungle, I am a lion of the jungle.
Even if obstacles come, I won't be afraid when I see them in my heart.
It doesn't matter if I lose, I won't let go of my pride, I won't be deceived. I am a lion of the jungle, I am a lion of the jungle.
Even if the wind blows hard, I will stand strong and face it. I am a lion of the jungle, I am a lion of the jungle.
Justice and truth will not be hidden from my eyes, even in the face of challenges. There is no politics, I am the king, and I will always work hard.
Even the storm that strikes will not stop me from shining on this earth. The storm and the rain will flow within me, I am the essence of strength.
The wind blows, and my eyes are fixed on the horizon, nothing else matters. I am a lion of the jungle, I am a lion of the jungle.
It doesn't matter if I miss out, even if I fall, I won't lose my heart, I will show my strength like a green plant. I am a lion of the jungle, I am a lion of the jungle.
Even if obstacles come, I won't be afraid when I see them in my heart.
